arts.ttl: Barcelona 'offered' out of favour Chelsea star as Axel Disasi race heats up
arts.sum: Chelsea forward Christopher Nkunku is looking to depart the club in search of more regular first team football, according to reports in Spain this week. The 26-year-old defender also joined the club in the summer of 2023, but has struggled for game time this season under Maresca with just 14 appearances across all competitions so far.

arts.ttl: Fulham looking to end 45-year winless run in Boxing Day clash with Chelsea
arts.sum: Fulham will be looking to end a 45-year winless run when they make the short trip to Stamford Bridge for a Boxing Day clash with West London neighbours Chelsea.

arts.ttl: Former Chelsea player Oscar returns to Brazil's Sao Paulo from China
arts.sum: Former Chelsea midfielder Oscar is returning to his Brazilian boyhood club Sao Paulo after 14 years, which included a long spell in Chinese soccer. Minutes later, Oscar thanked China’s Shanghai Port, where he played for eight seasons, for his time at the Chinese Super League club.
